signals.raw:
SOUTH KOREA INFLATION ROSE TO 2.2% IN MARCH 2026, UP FROM 2.0% IN PRIOR MONTHS BUT BELOW 2.4% FORECASTS | NO | MED confidence**

South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in January and February, remaining near the Bank of Korea's 2% target amid contained price pressures before global energy volatility.[2] This follows January's drop to a five-month low of 2.0%,
